Baptist Health South Florida - Same Day Care

April 1, 2026
BAPTIST HEALTH

Baptist Health Creates a Better Way to Better Same-Day Care.

https://youtu.be/l0PCdOXRu28 https://youtu.be/r5FV1uKJwRs https://youtu.be/Ts8wYXcXv80 https://youtu.be/xkU8I7X2d5o https://youtu.be/iGoSLfgJrNw

Results

530M+ impressions with 13.5M video completions. 2X Nearly 2X higher engagement on Meta with a 91% performance increase. 13.2% YOY volume growth across same-day care sevice lines. 80% of annual conversions reached, tracking to a 65% YOY increase.
